name: Lone Druid
description: I wonder what awaits me at the end of everything… Sylla, the Lone Druid Both Lone Druid and the Spirit Bear's attacks do not apply the counter on enemy creeps. However, the ability cast instantly applies all ability effects on enemy creeps.

abilities.name: Lone Druid Aghanim's
abilities.description: Entangle applies 5 stacks to enemy heroes in the area and has increased radius. Enemies no longer have protection from gaining stacks while Entangled. Grants bonus movement speed and bonus attack speed to allied units within the radius. Additionally applies a basic dispel to both Lone Druid and the Spirit Bear upon cast, and removes the simultaneous cast restriction while disabled.

abilities.name: Spirit Bear Aghanim's
abilities.description: Grants bonus movement speed and bonus attack speed to allied units within the radius. Additionally applies a basic dispel to both Lone Druid and the Spirit Bear upon cast, and removes the simultaneous cast restriction while disabled.

abilities.name: Entangle
abilities.description: Both Lone Druid and the Spirit Bear's attacks do not apply the counter on enemy creeps. However, the ability cast instantly applies all ability effects on enemy creeps. The debuff applies a root and damage over time after a number of attacks on the same enemy unit. Already debuff-affected enemy units do not increase the Entangle counter.

abilities.name: Spirit Link
abilities.description: Both the Lone Druid and the Spirit Bear shares a percentage of their lifesteal with each other. Grants the Spirit Bear a greater movement speed bonus. Requires its owner to have Savage Roar for this ability to be unlocked.

abilities.name: Savage Roar
abilities.description: Both Lone Druid and the Spirit Bear roar fiercely and applies a fountain-fear to enemy units within the radius. Grants affected enemy units bonus movement speed while fleeing toward their fountain. Grants bonus movement speed and bonus attack speed to allied units within the radius. Additionally applies a basic dispel to both Lone Druid and the Spirit Bear upon cast, and removes the simultaneous cast restriction while disabled.

abilities.name: True Form
abilities.description: Morphs into a melee raging bear. Grants bonus armor, health, and attack damage. Certain abilities now utilize a different cast animation while in True Form.
